name: Spicy Tofu Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the tofu in a large bowl.
2. Add remaining ingredients and mix well with fork or by hand.
3. Pack mixture into an oiled casserole dish, cover with two or three paper towels.
4. Steam for 25 to 35 minutes on a rack inside a covered pot with water on stove, or bake in oven at 375°F (190°C) using a pan of water.
5. The top will brown slightly; cool before removing from the dish.
6. Steaming blends flavors together.
7. Store up to two weeks in the refrigerator.
